name: ComponentItem
summary: The ComponentItem class contains information about the components in the Tekla Structures catalog.

constructors.name: ComponentItem
constructors.summary: Creates a new component item instance.

methods.name: Export
methods.signature: public virtual bool Export(ref string filename)
methods.summary: Exports the custom component item in *.uel-format to the to given file name. If path is not given custom component is exported to model folder. If filename is empty custom component name is used as filename.

params.name: filename
params.doc: The export file name of the component item.

methods.name: GetVersion
methods.summary: Gets the version number of custom component item from the component database.

params.name: version
params.doc: The version number of the component item.

returns.doc: Version number on success, int.MinValue if not found.

methods.name: Select(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool Select(string name, int number)
methods.summary: Selects the component item from the component database. Uses the type if defined for selection

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the component item to select.

params.name: number
params.doc: The number of the component item to select.

methods.name: Select(String, Int32, ComponentItem.ComponentTypeEnum)
methods.signature: public bool Select(string name, int number, ComponentItem.ComponentTypeEnum type)
methods.summary: Selects the component item from the component database.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the component item to select.

params.name: number
params.doc: The number of the component item to select.

params.name: type
params.doc: The type of the component item to select.

properties.name: AttributeFileExtension
properties.summary: Gets the attribute file extension of item from the component database.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The component item's internal name which is used by Tekla Structures in component identification.

properties.name: Number
properties.summary: The component item's internal number which is used by Tekla Structures in component identification.

properties.name: UIName
properties.summary: The component item's name which is visible in the Tekla Structures user interface.
